programme.title: The Way I See It
programme.desc: An unprecedented look behind the scenes of 2 of the most iconic Presidencies in our history, Obama and Reagan.

programme.title: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: Shirley MacLaine gives an amazing performance in this great musical based on Neil Simon's smash Broadway hit.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman who comes from a life of privilege falls for the owner of a soup kitchen after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his seven year old daughter.

programme.title: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: With the threat of having to close her father's candy store, Wendy and her six-year-old daughter Grace travel to the big city in hopes of making extra holiday cash to save the store.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Holiday Engagement

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Beauty & The Least
programme.desc: Ben Banks, college underachiever, finds purpose and love with Amy, spurring personal growth and redemption.

programme.title: Marrying the Mafia 2: Enemy-in-Law
programme.desc: Mafia boss's son, In-jae, falls for prosecutor Jin-kyung, sparking a dilemma between love and family safety.

programme.title: Intruder
programme.desc: Seo-jin has lost his wife in a car accident and tries to find the culprit through hypnosis. But in hypnosis he keeps seeing his long lost sister and fails to find the culprit. One day, You-jin returns home after 25 years, but Seo-jin feels sense of otherness and discomfort. He tries to convince his family that she might not be his sister but no one listens to him.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Rainey Storms
programme.desc: Powerful lawyer, Rainey Storms, inherits her family's law firm. When a senseless tragedy occurs, Rainey's faith in god is challenged, until she falls madly in love. Her dream man turns out be an imposter, and the stuff of nightmares.

programme.title: Blind Confession
programme.desc: C-Moe is Dallas's biggest drug dealer who is on top of the world. He has respect, fear, money, and with his beautiful, but dangerous first lady, they look to take over the world. When a tragic accident happens, he has no choice, but to learn how to live with the help of a hometown nurse.

programme.title: Just Between Us Girls
programme.desc: Amber, Naomi and Morgan have been close friends since high school. Now twenty years into their friendship, a typical girls' night out becomes anything but when loyalties are compromised, dark secrets are revealed, and traumatic truths are told.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Starring Danny Glover, ("Lethal Weapon") when a series of uncanny deja vu events begin to occur, a man is forced to re-examine his tragic past, memory, instinct and future.

programme.title: Reach Me
programme.desc: A motivational book written by a mysterious man inspires an unlikely group of people. Sylvester Stallone, Lauren Cohan, Cary Elwes and Terry Crews lead a star-studded cast.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: End Game
programme.desc: When Secret Service agent Alex Thomas (Cuba Gooding Jr.) acts too slowly to stop a crazed shooter, the president of the United States (Jack Scalia) is brutally shot in the middle of a press conference. In the wake of his death, journalist Kate Crawford (Angie Harmon) begins to suspect a massive conspiracy is afoot. Crawford convinces a skeptical Thomas to help her, and the two struggle to unravel the mystery behind the assassination -- before they become the next targets.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist and a miner must stop a massive earthquake that threatens to tear the world in half. Starring Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a local gang in front of her 12-year-old daughter Bethie. Despite Bethie being able to identify the attackers, the defense hires a local hot-shot defense attorney who manipulates the law to their advantage. When the criminals are set free, Gulf War veteran and detective John Dromoor is dismayed by the lack of justice and plots revenge against the men on Teena's behalf.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Plus, there's his alcoholic father (Tom Bower), boozy wife (Jennifer Coolidge) and prostitute girlfriend (Eva Mendes). And, he's just been saddled with a rookie partner (Shawn Hatosy). Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: Georgie Fame, Dave Cliff, James Powell & Brian Odjeas
programme.desc: Georgie Fame, known for "Yeh, Yeh" and "The Ballad of Bonnie and Clyde" makes a triumphant comeback with The Blue Flames. Georgie Fame and the Blue Flames was a popular band in the UK in the '60s, celebrated for its R&B, soul, jazz, ska, and pop sounds. The training was largely inspired by ska, a popular musical style in Jamaican cafes in London at the time. It was the song "Green Onions" from the Booker T & The MG that inspired Georgie to incorporate the Hammond organ into her compositions. This performance by Georgie Fame and the Blue Flames is brimming with blues and soulful sounds that will delight the group's old and new fans.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Wolfgang Dauner & Charlie Mariano
programme.sub-title: Piano and Sax: Charlie Mariano & Wolfgang Dauner
programme.desc: Piano and saxophone - this is an individualistic jazz duo combination. But the melodiousness and maturity of Charlie Mariano's saxophone and the freshness and feistiness of Wolfgang Dauner's piano turn the meeting of these two jazz greats into a thrilling interplay.

programme.title: Stan Getz
programme.desc: American jazz tenor saxophonist Stan Getz (1927-1991) was nicknamed "The Sound" for his warm, lyrical tone. Performing in bebop and cool jazz groups, he popularized bossa nova in America with the hit 'The Girl from Ipanema'. In the summer of 1983, Getz brought his working quartet to the Robert Mondavi Winery, Napa Valley, California, for a set that included Over The Edge, Answer Without Question, Sippin' At Bells, Tempus Fugit, and a bossa nova medley of Desafinado and The Girl From Ipanema. Getz (tenor saxophone) is joined by bassist Marc Johnson, drummer Victor Lewis, and pianist Jim McNeely.

programme.title: Errol Garner, Eddie Calhoun & Kelly Martin
programme.desc: Erroll Garner: Live in '63 & '64 presents two beautifully filmed concerts featuring his classic trio of bassist Eddie Calhoun and drummer Kelly Martin. Erroll Garner was one of jazz's true original players and this showcases his improvisational brilliance on a parade of his most classic numbers, such as “Fly Me To The Moon” and “I Get A Kick Out Of You”, as well as originals “Erroll's Theme,” “Mambo Erroll”, and his best-known composition, “Misty”.

programme.title: McCoy Tyner, Avery Sharpe & Louis Hayes
programme.sub-title: McCoy Tyner Trio live at Estival Lugano
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. McCoy Tyner's first main exposure came with Benny Golson, being the first pianist in Golson's and Art Farmer's Jazztet. He's also known for his work with the John Coltrane Quartet. Tyner's style is easily comparable to Coltrane's maximalist style of saxophone. Though a member of Coltrane's group, he was never overshadowed by the saxophonist, but complemented and even inspired Coltrane's open-minded approach. McCoy Tyner is considered one of the most influential jazz pianists of the 20th century, an honour he earned both with Coltrane and in his years of performing following Coltrane's death.

programme.title: Samba pros Orixás
programme.desc: The Da Pá Virada Sessions series presents the best musicians of contemporary Brazilian jazz, and beyond. Filmed and curated in São Paulo by director and presenter Dani Gurgel and producer and engineer Thiago Rabello, each session offers a unique experience by giving a fresh look into Brazil's music scene. The artists for each session are selected in consultation with Stingray DJAZZ's music editor. Influenced by the music of the past and present, samba collective Samba pros Orixás bridges the gap between tradition and modernity. Naturally, Samba pros Orixás' repertoire is dominated by sambas, alongside ijexás, jongos, samba de roda, and numerous other infectious Brazilian rhythms that will make you want to move. Don't miss out their tour-de-force performance!

programme.title: Blondie
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Blondie performs her hits including ''Heart of Glass", "Euphoria", ''Mile High" and many more…

programme.title: Blondie
programme.desc: Journalists and critics examine the rise and success of Blondie. This was a seemingly perfect punk-pop band fronted by one of the most the most iconic woman in music. Always creating, never following, always setting trends. After forming in the 1970s, Blondie continued to make music and tour the world.

programme.title: Iggy Pop
programme.desc: Iggy Pop is the vocalist of influential proto-punk band The Stooges, who reunited in 2003, and has been known for his outrageous and unpredictable stage antics. Pop's music has encompassed a number of styles over the course of his career, including garage rock, hard rock, new wave, jazz, art rock and bluesIn 2010, The Stooges were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.Journalists and critics discuss the rise of Iggy.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: El cazador de tesoros estadounidense John Casey regresa a las Filipinas con un nuevo equipo y nuevas tecnologías, con el objetivo de resolver uno de los más grandes misterios de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el marcador de una bomba, el equipo le llama a un experto en explosivos para que explore una cueva que podría haber sido el cuartel del general Yamashita. Adentro, descubren una posible trampa, así como la primera pista del tesoro.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: A falta de opciones, John planea perforar la montaña para ir bajo la cascada sin embargo, el clima dificulta mucho las cosas. Mientras tanto, Rick halla un artículo en la Grieta 6 que podría probar la presencia de los japoneses.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Mientras que John y Rick trabajan juntos para descifrar un mapa del Lirio Dorado, la Grieta 6 revela su primera pieza del tesoro. Mientras tanto, a Levi y a Geo se les ocurre una solución creativa para atravesar un derrumbe misterioso en el túnel.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Conforme el equipo llega al fondo de la Grieta 6, nuevas y sorprendentes pruebas indican que podrían haber llegado demasiado tarde. Mientras tanto, los mineros desencadenan un peligro en el túnel que los pone en riesgo.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Cuando un callejón sin salida amenaza acabar con la exploración, se abre una nueva oportunidad. Utilizando su mapa del Lirio Dorado recién descifrado, el equipo descubre nuevos puntos de acceso, con la esperanza de acceder al interior de la cascada.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II

programme.title: La Isla Desafío Extremo
programme.desc: Un recorrido por lugares remotos de Turquía en el que concursantes enfrentan retos de supervivencia.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio conoce a Leonor y comienza a coquetearle, aunque ella disimula con Alejandro. Marco Mejía visita a Ramiro en su oficina y le pregunta por Sonia: él le dice que está en Londres con su hija.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ximena pregunta a Aurelio si tuvo algo que ver con la muerte del cardenal. Él le promete a su esposa que va a cambiar, pero ella está decidida a escapar, por lo que le pide al Turco que la ayude.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica se arrepiente de haber golpeado al Triste y le pide disculpas, dice que Casillas no le volverá a ver la cara de idiota. Ximena visita a Cleto, y el Turco se entera del plan de Aurelio.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.sub-title: Esta vida no es para mí
programme.desc: Alba descubre a Ximena a punto de huir. Aurelio les dice al Cabo y a Tijeras que les dejará el territorio de los Robles y de los Villalobos. Cleto está preocupado, no sabe nada del cargamento.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Turco le declara su amor a Ximena, y ella está dispuesta a dejar a Aurelio, pero él se despierta y nota su ausencia. Leonor dopa a Alejandro para que no se sobrepase con ella.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio está angustiado, le pide a su gente que suspendan todo y se dediquen a localizar a Ximena. El Topo Galván le propone a Óscar Cadena asociarse en los túneles que tiene a disposición.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ximena decide regresar cuando Alba le cuenta que su padre está en terapia intensiva. Benítez le agradece al general Jiménez el haber detenido a don Cleto y darles un duro golpe a los carteles.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio golpea a su esposa y le dice que no podrá salir de la casa sin su permiso. Leonor queda preocupada al saber que Casillas descubrió su arma. Marco le ofrece a Ximena que ayude a Cleto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes deciden pagar el dinero del rescate por su hermano, pero Dínora y Fernando no cumplen con la entrega de Gabriela y Juan, y en medio de una balacera huyen con ellos en la camioneta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas y tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Fernando que revise si traen con ellos el dinero y se dan cuenta del engaño de sus empleados. Dínora cambia la ruta para despistar a la policía y hace que se pierdan más.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se agota en el recorrido por la selva pantanosa y Juan dice que no va a continuar sin ella. Dínora dispara al aire y esto lo escuchan Franco y Óscar, que van tras esa pista.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora admite que están perdidos, pues no los ha guiado bien y le jura a Fernando que pase lo que pase, Juan no sale con vida. Entrada la noche, un animal pica a Dínora. Rosario despierta del coma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se cansa de cargar a Dínora en una camilla improvisada y propone continuar sin ella. Eva decide ayudar a Benito y se asocia con él para crear una fábrica de hamburguesas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora se aferra a Juan como su última salvación, desesperada ataca a Fernando, quien le dispara y ve cómo el cuerpo de ella se pierde en el pantano. Rosario se disculpa con Franco y Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Aníbal, el tío de los Reyes, se encarga de organizar la expedición de rescate, lo acompañan Franco, Óscar y la policía. A Juan se le agudiza el dolor de la pierna y Fernando se va por su lado.

programme.title: Volver a Amar

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - Unas Vacaciones Fantásticas: El padre de Zeynep le encomienda desde la cárcel una misión importante a Fatih. Mientras, Irem y Mukaddes quieren sembrar rumores de una infidelidad.

programme.title: Volver a Amar

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Dilema: Eve Nine se encuentra en un terrible dilema. Mukaddes va a hablar con los Yaşaran para intentar llegar a un acuerdo. Mustafá llega en cuanto puede y muestra un lado que nadie esperaba. Fatmagül deja el hospital.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Kerim: Mukaddes se sale con la suya y llega a un acuerdo con el abogado de los Yaşaran. Eve Nine y Galip dudan de la culpabilidad de Kerim pero no tienen pruebas para defenderlo.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Búsqueda: Todos andan en busca de Fatmagül. Los Yaşaran se hacen cargo de todo y lograr encubrir evidencia. Eve Nine y Galip siguen en busca de respuestas. Kerim es capturado por la policía.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Habladurías: Remi ayuda a Fatmagül a no tomar una decisión desesperada. Eve Nine, las familias de Fatmagül y Mustafá luchan contra las habladurías del pueblo. Los padres de Mustafá piden ayuda a las autoridades.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Cambios: Selim y Erdogan hablan con sus padres. Fatmagül se prepara para un gran cambio en su vida. Mustafá sigue desesperado y jura vengarse cueste lo que cueste.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Después de la Fiesta: Eve Nine y la familia de Fatmagül están con ella en el hospital intentando entender lo que ha pasado. Selim pierde su anillo y los chicos se recuperan de una noche de fiesta.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Dilema: Eve Nine se encuentra en un terrible dilema. Mukaddes va a hablar con los Yaşaran para intentar llegar a un acuerdo. Mustafá llega en cuanto puede y muestra un lado que nadie esperaba. Fatmagül deja el hospital.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le dice a Matilde que esperará a que su amor sea correspondido. Don Hilario anuncia el compromiso de Manuel y Matilde. Manuel le asegura a Matilde que la ama y que está orgulloso de ella. Delfino le promete a Adolfo que lo ayudará a escapar.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le asegura a Delfino que buscará a Matilde para explicarle lo que pasó. Hilario le recrimina a Augusta que le haya dicho a Matilde lo del préstamo que les hizo Manuel. Adolfo busca a Pilar.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Furioso, Manuel entra en la habitación de Matilde y la abofetea le dice que se la llevará porque pagó las deudas de su familia y salvó a su padre de morir en la vergüenza.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le dice a Delfino que el padre de Manuel es uno de los hombres más ricos del país, pero que eso no lo detendrá para quitarle a Matilde. Prudencia le dice a Augusta que está escribiendo una carta a Matilde para saber si la puede visitar.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Rosario se sorprende al ver a Manuel. El padre Urbano le pide que le de trabajo a Rosario y Matilde intercede para que la deje a su servicio. El padre Urbano le aconseja a Manuel aceptar su error y comprender los errores de Matilde.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que su matrimonio es un fracaso y le ruega que la deje regresar con sus padres le jura que no buscará a Adolfo. Manuel le recuerda que le juró amarlo hasta la muerte.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo se presenta con Manuel como Felipe Santamaría, el nuevo administrador. Manuel le dice a Matilde que invitó al administrador a comer y que le gustaría presentárselo.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Antonia, aprovechando que Manuel esta ebrio, lo besa. Delfino los ve y se lo cuenta a Adolfo. Manuel le pide perdón a Antonia y le dice que la quiere como a una hermana. Matilde los ve y le pregunta si es su querida.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le dice a Matilde que Manuel no la merece. Augusta recoge la carta donde Manuel le pide que vaya por Matilde.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Renato le pide dinero prestado a Bella, y ella acepta prestarle con la condición de que le entregue las escrituras de la hacienda como aval. El gobernador de Valle Encantado le ofrece a Sergio el puesto político que él quiera.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita comienza a sospechar que María tiene un amante por lo que la investiga y la sigue. María le confiesa a Agripina que ella es la madre de Nandito.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita sufre porque cree que María tiene un amante, por lo que cita a Nandito para descubrir la verdad. Soraya conoce a Alicia y a su padre y a quien planea conquistar.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina consigue encerrar a Meche en una clínica psiquiátrica. Magnolia tiene que llevarse a Andresito a vivir con ella por unos días.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Rodolfo enfurece al ver que Magnolia no quiere pasar tiempo con Gustavito. Magnolia se entera de que María Mercedes está internada en un hospital psiquiátrica. Jorge Luis idea un plan para sacar a María Mercedes del hospital.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Corazón se encuentra con Sergio y ella no duda en contarle a Marimar Marimar se entera que la esposa de Renato pronto llegará a Valle Encantado.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Renato le pide dinero prestado a Bella, y ella acepta prestarle con la condición de que le entregue las escrituras de la hacienda como aval. El gobernador de Valle Encantado le ofrece a Sergio el puesto político que él quiera.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita comienza a sospechar que María tiene un amante por lo que la investiga y la sigue. María le confiesa a Agripina que ella es la madre de Nandito.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Josefina le ruega a Dimitrio que no se vaya de su lado. Angélica se alegra al saberse amada por José Luis. Amelia le confiesa a Graciela por qué se separó de su marido. Ezequiel le cuenta a Refugio que Esmeralda corre un gran peligro en su trabajo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Alejando se molesta al saber que Antonio está enamorado de Montserrat. Graciela idea un plan para lograr apoderarse de la fortuna de Alejandro.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Refugio siente celos al ver a Esmeralda bailarles a sus compañeros de trabajo. Dimitrio le jura a Virginia que pronto se divorciará de Josefina para poder estar con ella. María lleva a cabo sus planes para matar a Montserrat.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Rosario le confiesa a Montserrat que es la madre de Alejandro. Montserrat da a luz a un niño. Joaquín le dice a Alejandro que José Luis y Montserrat son cómplices para quedarse con la herencia de Angélica.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Alejandro está decidido a matar a José Luis. Angélica le pide a Montserrat que la ayude para que Alejandro no le haga daño a José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó

programme.title: ¡Despierta América!
programme.desc: El programa de variedad mañanero de entretenimiento, en el cual se incluyen las noticias de primera plana a nivel nacional y mundial, los temas de interés general, lo nuevo en la televisión, entrevistas con personajes famosos que están haciendo noticia, recetas de cocina, consejos útiles, concursos, moda y estilo, los chismes en el mundo de la farándula, parodias y mucho más. Este show que se ha transmitido y ha alegrado a su audiencia por más de una década, es ligero, ameno y divertido, ha mantenido al público informado de una forma jovial y casual.

programme.title: El gordo y la flaca

Durante el transcurso de los años se han rebelado escándalos y algunas veces las estrellas han estado dispuestas a hablar y a decirlo todo ante las cámaras del programa.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques loves to cook with the seasons, but many ingredients are actually available year-round. A Smoked Salmon Plate using Scottish or Irish salmon, Soupy Rice with Peas using fresh or frozen peas, Fast Lobster Fricassee using summer or winter lobster, Broccoli Purée with Brown Butter, Broccoli Stem Relish, and Vanilla Hazelnut Dessert are all favorites.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Once again, Jacques demonstrates techniques to help you spend less time in the kitchen. Asparagus Custards and an Apple Skillet Cake can be done ahead, and re-heated. A quick Cold Black Bean Soup can be made in minutes and Slow-cooked Tuna Steaks with Tomato Relish free up the cook while the oven does most of the work.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: When the weather heats up it's time for family dishes that work on the grill or in the pan. Jacques' great summer menu with Asparagus in Butter Sauce, a Grilled Steak with Zucchini, topped with Anchovy Butter, Curly Dogs for the kids. He shows you classic ways to cut potatoes and ends with a Patriotic Raspberry and Blueberry Galette.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life's greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father's Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don't have to spend a fortune if you chose what's in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you're in a hurry, it's okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques suggests that mastering simple skills and techniques will make your life easier and when you're comfortable in the kitchen, you'll be more creative and avoid the trap of a quick fix with a frozen meal…or worse! He teaches you how to sharpen knives, cut and prepare vegetables and eggs and finally make a delicious gratin.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques enjoyed many new food trends. But on a cold damp night, he still craves classic dishes like onion soup or for a family dinner or an elegant meal, a roast chicken. For him, these dishes will never go out of fashion, just like the apple galette he's been making for decades.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves egg––eggs cooked any way. He makes them for us, fried, as an omelet, en cocotte, hard cooked and baked. Perfect for breakfast, lunch, or dinner he buys organic eggs from a local producer, and recommends that you buy the best quality and the freshest you can find… He paints a lot of chickens too and has included some of his favorites for you to enjoy!

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed's Pasta Primavera…

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques doesn't always eat dessert at home, but when he does, it's usually some kind of seasonal fruit. Classics like Baked Apple Bon Femme, Bananas Flambe, Cherry Compote or Pears in Puff Pastry… are served often. A new favorite is a British Lemon Posset. Other simple staples are Blueberries with Lemon and Mint or Grapefruit with Apricot Sauce, all great ways to end a meal.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques prepares a beautiful room temperature buffet in which all of the dishes can be prepared ahead. A menu of Pico de Gallo, Asparagus with Croutons and Chorizo, Melon and Prosciutto, Oven-Baked Salmon with Sun-Dried Tomato and Salsa Mayonnaise, Sweet Cheese Medley, and a gorgeous, layered Almond Cake with Berries is ideal for any celebratory gathering of family and friends.

programme.title: Bullseye!
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. But with Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule of repo.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car. And finally, Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.sub-title: President Joe Biden & First Lady Jill Biden

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Between Earth and Sky, the Andin Condor
programme.desc: Between the plains of the pampas and the peaks of the Andes, the condor, the sacred bird is close to extinction. In Argentina, Vanesa Astore and her team lead a reintroduction program by promoting their reproduction in captivity. In addition to the creation of a network of protected natural areas for the conservation of condors, Vanesa is committed to the fight against the use of toxic baits by cattle breeders.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The decline of the pangolin is staggering. Virtually exterminated from all over Asia, it still survives in Africa. But the Asian market demands ever increasing quantities, the value of its scales reaching disproportionate prices. A new symbol of human greed, the animal will not last long. Despite this dire fate, Tessa wants to believe in another future for the pangolin. She joined forces with the Aka pygmies in the great forest of the Congo Basin to come to the aid of this endearing animal, the last vestige of prehistoric times.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: The Leatherback Turtle, A Long Journey
programme.desc: On the immense beaches that separate the Atlantic Ocean from the tropical forest, Darly Itoumba and his team watch over the leatherback turtles every night. A veritable prehistoric animal emerging from the abyss of the ocean, leatherback turtles are threatened by human activities but tirelessly, they return to lay eggs on Gabonese beaches and under the benevolent gaze of Darly.

programme.title: Saving Paradise
programme.sub-title: Cano Cristales, The Five Colors River
programme.desc: The La Macarena National and Ecological ReservePark, located in the heart of Colombia, is home to one of the most beautiful rivers in the world: the Caño Cristales. Due to the civil war, this river of five colors was cut off from the outside world for nearly 60 years. However, it shelters a unique fauna and flora.

programme.title: Saving Paradise
programme.sub-title: The Wild Archipelago Of The Bissagos Islands
programme.desc: A natural paradise located off the coast of Guinea Bissau, the Bissagos archipelago is a strategic place for the conservation of the planet's biodiversity.

programme.title: Saving Paradise
programme.sub-title: The Sanctuary Of Umphang In Thailand
programme.desc: Classified as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, Umphang Sanctuary, the largest in Thailand, is an outstanding biodiversity refuge in Asia.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South East Asia - From Myanmar to Cambodia
programme.desc: South East Asia offers mysterious old cultures, steaming cook-shops, exotic plants and animals, and monks deep in prayer. A journey through this area reveals everything that life has to offer. We visit Myanmar, where tourism is still in its infancy and undisturbed temples and nature are sights to behold. Then, in Cambodia we find the mysterious temples of Angkor. And finally, we head over to Vietnam to enjoy the beaches, rivers, and Buddhist pagodas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile– the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo” – the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat “Northanger” to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: George Kourounis returns to “Tornado Alley” with three of his fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring. He gets a birthday gift of a large Kansas tornado, then travels to Missouri to witness a string of violent thunderstorms. Heading west to Crazy Horse Mountain, the team is in place for a huge storm sweeping through the Badlands of South Dakota.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: Calm Of Nature
programme.desc: Take a breather on Newfoundland and Labrador's picturesque Change Islands, famous for its brightly-hued saltbox houses.

programme.title: Morning Sun on Yosemite Falls
programme.desc: Watch as the morning sunlight slowly casts its golden light onto the majestic Upper Yosemite Falls, with this 4K ultra high definition real-time nature video featuring stereo sounds captured along the falls trail. It's perfect for meditating or for transforming your TV into a window to one of North America's most grandiose and inspiring locations.

programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Above the Spanish Islands sweeps viewers on an inspirational, beauty-filled 50 minute aerial voyage over the wonders of Mallorca & The Canary Islands in 4K ultra high definition - viewers will enjoy a dazzling, dynamic array of locations and shots- all perfectly synchronized to spa-style relaxation music.

programme.title: Beautiful Kauai: Hawaii
programme.desc: Explore the many facets of Kauai's natural beauty, from breathtaking beaches to blooming flowers and everything in between.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the view of sparkling waves crashing over the serene California coast.

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Known to locals as Basdaku Beach, the name translates to "big sand," and it's no surprise why. Step into this expansive, white sandy beach of crystal clear waters and lose yourself in the never-ending kaleidoscope horizon of changing hues.

programme.title: Diamond Beach II: Indonesia
programme.desc: Often compared to the idyllic beach scenes of postcards, these shores and accompanying diamond-shaped cliffs that lend their name are sure to awe and inspire.

programme.title: Earth And Stars III — A Sustainable Future by Climate Art Collection
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: A Sustainable Future presented by Climate Art Collection — This collection addresses climate change awareness through art, in collaboration with the Climate Art Collection, the largest collection of climate change-related artworks in the world. It highlights the Climate Art Collection's mission to support climate initiatives through art and make scientific concepts more accessible.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E1 — A captivating art collection that embraces the colors of fall and the cozy ambiance of pumpkin spice. This assortment of artworks celebrates the rich palette of warm hues, including burnt oranges, golden yellows, deep reds, and earthy browns.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest II
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E2 — Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia

programme.title: Young At Heart: Back to School
programme.desc: Young At Heart E2: Back to School — Showcasing a delightful array of imaginative and playful depictions, each artwork invites you into a realm of enchantment and wonder. The whimsical and fantastical elements are bound to delight, captivate, and inspire art enthusiasts of all ages.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.
